productDisplayName: Hanes Women Short Sleeve White Innerwear T-shirt
description: Composition White V-neck T-shirt made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton fabric, short sleeves, ribbed lay flat collar, pleats on the back chest and print with glitter effect on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Step out in comfort and style with this hanes short sleeve T-shirt. Lightweight with a V-neck, this Hanes T-shirt in ComfortSoft cotton is stylish, and yet relaxed. The lay flat collar never stretches out of shape even after repeated washes, while the fabric contours your body with ease. Perfect on its own with jeans, this T-shirt also works great with shorts and track pants. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7", Chest: 33"
